stages.objective: Observe RR dispatch/compute alternation in trace output.
stages.goal: Show that both runnable jobs receive time slices before completion.
stages.theory_detail: RR fairness evidence comes from repeated dispatch rotation under fixed quantum.

hints.concept: RR fairness appears as alternating service opportunities.
hints.explicit: Run enough steps to capture multiple dispatch events and compare p1/p2 cadence.

stages.objective: Diagnose whether RR trace behavior still yields full completion.
stages.goal: Pass both trace and completion checks under default RR config.

hints.nudge: Do not stop at trace-only evidence.
hints.concept: Scheduling quality requires both mechanism evidence and completion outcome.
hints.explicit: Continue until completed_processes reaches 2, then submit.

stages.objective: Apply RR tuning and verify behavior remains correct.
stages.goal: Tune policy/quantum within limits while preserving completion and trace checks.

hints.nudge: Use one policy change at a time.
hints.concept: Tuning changes cadence, not correctness obligations.
hints.explicit: Apply policy update, rerun, then verify trace and completed_processes together.
